subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The bounty of utterance floweth forth and the feast of love descendeth. Joy is made manifest from every direction, for the traces of the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله نعمت بیان جاری و مائده محبت نازل سرور از هر جهت ظاهر چه که آثار قلم
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
